reviews.review_title: Relaxing game no matter your age
reviews.review_description:
I love this game? It's relaxing and it's a positive and encouraging game. I'm 57 years old and it's my favorite game to play in the evenings to relax before bed. But I do find myself playing this anytime.
The only con is trying to figure out how to do things that have no guidance or instructions. I welcome more you tube videos to help us out. 
An example: I like to give gifts and I can't understand what Bella (? Plant girl) wants. I tried to give her flowers and she didn't like them. What does she like?  
I keep getting bar stools and kids carnival stuff with the floating packages. Should I sell them or should I be setting up for a restaurant and a kids carnival? What am I looking forward to as I go further in the game? I've been playing for about a month or so?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the lovely review! 🌸 It warms our hearts that Little Planet is your favorite evening relaxation spot.
Regarding Bella: She’s a bit picky! Instead of flowers, try giving her some high value items or treats—she'll appreciate those much more! 🍎 As for the carnival items, you can absolutely sell them for coins or save them to build your very own themed park—there’s no 'wrong' way to play! 🎢
As a small team, we’re still working on more guides, but our Discord (https://discord.gg/littleplanet) is a big family where many players share tips and YouTube videos. We’d love to help you personally there and earn that 5th star! ✨

reviews.review_description: Such a cozy game, you can lose yourself in it for hours at a time, I really hope they keep adding new things to it. Also, you can communicate with players and make new friends and visit their planets. So good

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 🌸 We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the cozy vibes and making new friends—visiting other planets is one of our favorite parts too!
As a small team, we are definitely committed to keeping the world growing with new features and items. We’d love to have you in our Discord family to hear your ideas for future updates: https://discord.gg/littleplanet. See you on the planet! ✨

reviews.review_description:
Edit: once you put a lot of hours in, it gets better and by linking to discord and writing a review i got freebies in game. The game has an animal crossing sorta vibe and each character has their own personality. I now want to get my friends to play. 

____
its a cute game, i havent got that far. Its a shame my backpack is too full

developer_response.body:
Thank you for giving Little Planet a try! We’re glad the game feels cute so far, and we understand how frustrating it can be when your backpack fills up before you’ve had time to explore much.

We’re always looking at ways to make early inventory management feel smoother. If you’re stuck or something feels off with your backpack space, please contact us at support@littleplanet.world or ask Amber/the team on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet. We’d be happy to help you keep exploring.

reviews.review_description:
I’m ask to write a review, so I can get my backpack upgrade. I’ve never cared for those types of reviews but, mine will be honest. 

I am one who payed and supported this game from the beginning, before it became F2P. 

On discord I ask if an accessibility option could be added to the settings. Where when you’re holding your equipment (since you’re holding things almost all the time) if it could get a toggle to where it automatically grips instead of always holding your hand in a grip. 
I was told politely “to take regular breaks and that’s not possible at this time “. 
Thing is, you know one doesn’t understand a thing about injuries that affect people’s lives, when they think a simple break corrects it. No. It does not.

I have been a gamer for decades now. I own PSVR, PSVR2, Quest2, Quest3, PC, PS5, Xbox, Switch 1 and Switch 2! 
I play hundreds of games and a toggle feature is doable. 
In MANY of my chill, cozy, life simulation games, many developers have added this common feature. It is an accessibility option and great for people who suffer with some sort of affliction. 
So I do hope this game will eventually care enough about its player base to help people with afflictions.

Also, I get that weeds and trees, rocks and so on constantly pop up all over the place. Like in Animal Crossing.. But, when paths are placed down and you’re trying to have a nice, decorated area, it would be nice if the paths could stay clear. They should spawn on it.

And I still hope a bit of optimization still comes for more fluid movement. If you move faster, this game loves to blur. Which is hard on the eyes. I’m guessing they want you to move at a snail speed but, I don’t always have time to waste like that. 

I do like the fomo isn’t as bad.. They are trying on that front. 
I do not like all these games that always want a daily log in. 
I know devs want people only on there game, but when it’s a system I have to prep, just to log in to get an item, that’s still fomo.  
And now I have so many games across so many systems that do that. Not to mention, it’s like sorry if life hits you, you miss out. 

But for vr, it’s good. But can be better. 🤞

developer_response.body:
【follow up】
Hi OrionDreams, I wanted to personally follow up on your accessibility feedback.
In our latest update released yesterday, we added a new Long-Hold Tool Setting, which gives players another way to adjust how long-held tools work and reduce the need to keep gripping constantly. Your review helped push this conversation forward for our team, so thank you again for explaining it so clearly.
If you have time to try the new setting, we’d really appreciate hearing whether it helps, or what still feels difficult. You can reach us at support@littleplanet.world or message Amber/the team on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet. We’ll keep listening and improving.
【History】
Hi OrionDreams, thank you for your honesty and for supporting us since our early days—we truly value players like you.
I am sincerely sorry that our previous response regarding the grip toggle came across as dismissive; that was not our intention, and we clearly missed the mark on understanding the importance of accessibility. As a small team, we sometimes struggle to prioritize, but we hear you loud and clear now: accessibility is not a luxury, it's a necessity. We will ensure this feature request is re-evaluated by our engineers as a priority for our accessibility roadmap.
Regarding the paths being blocked by spawning items and the motion blur during movement, these are excellent points for our optimization pass. We also hear your frustration regarding 'daily login FOMO'—we are trying to find a better balance that respects your time.
Thank you for being a 'North Star' for us. Please join our Discord (https://discord.gg/littleplanet) and tag our community manager (@Amber) directly. I’d love to personally update you as we push these changes forward. Your experience matters to us.

reviews.review_description: This game is, i would assume, a children game and it is super amusing to play even as a teen and its also very child friendly and teaches some lessons and lets you create what you can imagine into your own world.

I started playing Little Planet just to try it out… and somehow lost track of time. Now I’m collecting cards like a space explorer with a serious addiction.

The planets are colorful, the gameplay is fun, and there’s always something new to discover. It’s simple to learn but surprisingly addictive.

If you like VR games and collecting things, be careful… this game might steal a few hours of your life (in a good way).

developer_response.body: Welcome to the creator club! 🚀 We apologize (just a little!) for 'stealing' those hours, but we’re thrilled you’re enjoying the item collecting as much as we do. See you at the next discovery! 🌎✨

reviews.review_description: Ive been only playing for a few days but its a pretty fun game so far! Its nice that you are able to play solo or make friends! And being able to decorate everything to have it just the way you want it is very nice too! I honestly see it as the vr version of animal crossing lol.

developer_response.body: Welcome to Little Planet!  We’re so glad you’re enjoying the freedom to play solo or with friends.  We’d love to see how you’re decorating your world—feel free to share some photos in our Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet. See you there! ✨

reviews.review_description: I love this game so much, honestly it’s one of my absolute favorites. It has such a cute and cozy vibe, a kind and friendly community, and the Little Planet team is always trying their best. Even though the game is already really good, it keeps improving more and more all the time.

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a lovely review! It means a lot to hear that Little Planet has become one of your favorites, and we’re so happy the cozy world, friendly community, and ongoing updates are all landing for you. We’ll keep doing our best to make it better with every update. Come hang out with us on Discord and share your planet anytime: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: So the game is great and it was a very cute looking when I first played it. But When I tried making my name into "Dante" because that's a character from Devil May Cry (a game and anime). Even though it got censored, I'm pretty sure thats not a bad name in a different language or anything, if it is, sorry. Also, when I tried making a name for the island or tent I was living it, i forgot what it was but I made the name into "Devil May Cry" because as I said before, its a game and anime. But "Devil" got censored, I get why because devil is a bad somewhat word but it shouldn't be censored. And another thing about the name thing is that another character from Devil May Cry (Dante's brother), Vergil's name wasn't censored. I don't understand why Dante's name is censored but Vergil's isn't. Im sorry if i'm making a big deal out of this but I just wanted my favorite character, Dante, as my name. Bye!

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for explaining this so clearly. We completely understand how disappointing it feels when the name you wanted to use gets blocked, especially when it has a personal meaning to you.

Little Planet is designed and rated for an all-ages audience, so we have to strictly follow Meta Quest’s rating and content-filter requirements, including how sensitive words are defined. Since our rating is not as high as the title you were referencing, the name filter can be more restrictive than expected. We’re very sorry for the inconvenience.

reviews.review_description: I've enjoyed the game so far. It seems very polished while maintaining an "indie" feel. A few minor bugs with UI, but I've only played three days and they've already done an update in that time. Voice acting on characters is fun. The tutorial section at the beginning is a bit too long for my preference, but once you get to a place where you can move around freely you can start exploring and doing quests at your own pace.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the thoughtful review! We’re really happy the game feels polished while still keeping that small-team indie charm, and it’s great to hear the character voices are landing well.

We also hear you on the early tutorial feeling a bit long and the minor UI bugs. We’ll keep polishing that first stretch so players can get to the freer exploration pace more smoothly. If you notice any specific UI issue again, please contact us at support@littleplanet.world or share it with Amber/the team on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet. Your notes help us make Little Planet better. ✨

reviews.review_description: ￼ This game is so lovely. I love building, creating and exploring and this is such a nice and cozy game ￼ ￼ one of the best thing about is is building your imagination and it coming true with virtual reality and building your dream little planet.

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a lovely review! Building your imagination into a dream little planet is exactly the kind of magic we hope VR can bring. We’d love to see what you create, so come share your world with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: Its a great game to wind down and just explore and build your planet!! I really love the cute NPCs around the game too!! And the best part? ZERO complaints!! Keep up the great work!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the sweet review! We’re so glad Little Planet has been a cute place to wind down, explore, build, and hang out with the Planet Pals. “Zero complaints” made our day. Come show us what you’re building on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description:
I got this two days ago and it's my go to game now. Have played it at least for 9 hours a day. It's like animal crossing but in vr. To be honest I'd heard of animal crossing when I had a Nintendo ds afew years ago. But I wasn't keen on it. But having it in vr is great. I absolutely love it.  What's not to like. The cute animals are great. Makes me laugh at some of the things that they say.  There are a few glitches but nothing big it's just when I add things to my backpack they don't always go in. But I've noticed that the next day they are in the lost and found bin. 

There is a few things that would make it easier  to grab and place. Like when you place a fence or a ornament it moves them. Would be cool to have a function to lock the item in place. 

Overall I think it's a great game.  The whole reason I got a vr headset in the first place is so I could play games which are fun especially when my mental health issues play up. This game definitely helps with that.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for such a thoughtful review. It means a lot to hear that Little Planet has become your go-to VR space. 💛

We’re really glad the Planet Pals are making you laugh too. For the backpack issue and the way placed items can shift, thank you for calling those out clearly. The “lock item in place” idea is genuinely useful, and we’ll share it with the team.

Could you please share more about the backpack issue and your idea about item placement, so we can make Little Planet together. Contact us at support@littleplanet.world or share the details with Amber/the team on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet. We’d love to keep making Little Planet smoother for you.

reviews.review_description: This is the kind of game I have been waiting for. Pretty much you do anything you want to do to your planet. Plenty of stuff to decorate with, plant and build. There's a  slight disadvantage if you don't do multiplayer. I don't go to other people's planets so I can't finish some of the quests. But I recommend this game to anybody that just wants to create and then create again and again. Can't wait to see what's next in the game.

developer_response.body:
We're so glad you're finding the creative freedom you've been waiting for! 🌍 Regarding the multiplayer quests: we hear you loud and clear. As a small team, we wanted to encourage social play, but we don't want to leave our dedicated solo explorers behind!
We are actively looking into how we can make quest progression more accessible for everyone, regardless of playstyle. Your feedback is exactly what helps us balance this. Please join our Discord (https://discord.gg/littleplanet) to share more ideas on how we can improve this—we'd love to have your input! ❤️

reviews.review_description: Peaceful and great to play, allow a way to move with x, or y buttons because of people that might have major stick drift

Little Planet game is fun. Just not sure what to do sometimes. Always new monthly events! Game does crash sometimes when visiting other planets.
Get the game if you like relaxing game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the thoughtful review! We’re glad you’re enjoying the relaxing side of Little Planet and the monthly events, but we’re sorry about the crashes when visiting other planets.

If you can share when it happens, like whose planet you were visiting or what you were doing right before the crash, it would really help us investigate. Please contact us at support@littleplanet.world or share the details with Amber/the team on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet. We’ll keep working to make visiting smoother.

reviews.review_description: This is such a pleasant game to play. I find it really relaxing and the hours just vanish. I love the feel of the game there is no pressure , no fighting just build, gathering, fish or garden to your hearts content. This is a great game to play with the family. 👍🏻

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a lovely review! 🌿 We’re so happy the no-pressure building, gathering, fishing, and gardening are helping the hours vanish in the best way. It’s wonderful to hear Little Planet has become a relaxing place for your family too. 💛Come meet more friends in our Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: Very cute little game. I tried it a few years ago and feel like now its come long enough to be an enjoyable experience.

developer_response.body: Welcome back, and thank you! It means a lot to hear that Little Planet feels more enjoyable now after all the updates and polishing. We’ll keep improving it, and we’d love to see your planet on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: My kids love playing this game! It's creative and calming. They can play hours long and not thinking of any other game. Thank you!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re so happy your kids are enjoying Little Planet as a creative and calming place to play. It means a lot to hear they can get so immersed in their own little worlds. Come share their favorite creations with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_title: An amazing game that enriches your life
reviews.review_description: I never wanted to play this type of game before. However, after my friend's strong recommendation and continuous support (because I was still not quite interested in the early period), I became enthusiastic once I started to see my creations/works being fulfilled. Now, I spend hours in the game world every day.

developer_response.body: Watching your own creations come to life is a special kind of fulfillment. Thank you for making Little Planet a part of your daily life—we love having you here!

reviews.review_description:
If you are a fan of the popular Animal crossing games then you are sure to absolutely adore Little Planet.  I'm not going to talk about all the positive aspects of this title but the reason why such a great idea only gets 3 stars.   It's a tease! Simply put this game feels like a masterpiece in the making.  Not only is this game super short it's like your playing a demo or a teaser to what is yet to be released. This game left me wanting so much more, not because it wasn't fun to play, but there was a lack of things to do!

Yes this game gets 3 stars because my fun came to a crushing sudden stop.
I was having such a great time that I soon found myself with nothing to do besides going into the store once a real time day to see what they were selling to add to my collection disappointed if they already had the same items as yesterday's or you already have the items shown.  I also wish the TV would show some kind of cartoon or weather and other items were able to have some sort of animation or "Easter egg" effect for an example if you were to touch the helium and the gas sprays out and you grab a match and hold the flame to the gas it will show a small flame. Again that's an example and I would think if this was added in game it will be like a tip of the hat showing that our reviews matter.   

Another thing I want to see added would be a option to have time go by a bit slower,  I find the days go by really quickly!  

Also I can't find bugs to collect? The loading screen says you can do something with discord with collected bugs am I missing something? 

 I suggest that there be a away to edit signs and have more lights for the outside areas, more quests from friends and shorter seasonal events I am writing this review on 5-1-26 and I'm still picking up eggs.

  I would love to became a member to support future developments 100 %

I would like there to be better clothing options for men that look like an adult would wear not just children I'm a child at heart but I don't want bunny ears and flowers.

 And one major piece of advice do something other games don't do. Like add more rooms to your house! Maybe a cool hidden spy room in your home you can buy at the end of upgrading your house, golden tools that last 3x as long, a stove to cook and prepare foods, I can go on and on with ideas the last idea i want to add is maybe animated windows, so if it's raining you can see rain hitting widows if there's a storm show lightning. cold out? Show ice. 

I look forward to seeing what the future holds and my flame come to life on my balloon cart!

Overall this game is super fun super addictive and leaves you begging for more! I highly recommend supporting the development team by becoming a member to not only to get bonus items like stars but future developments and progress of a masterpiece I personally don't want to see fail or go away!

Michael T

This is a cute game yet no matter how many times I talk to all five different NPCs it only keeps saying I've talked to three. I've gone back in everyday for a week now and I only have 9 hours left. Not sure why it's not registering when I talk to the different NPCs.

developer_response.body: We love that you're finding 'endless ideas' in our world! 🏡 Whether it's gardening or decorating, we can't wait to see what you build. Feel free to share your designs on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: Awesome game with nice music as well. Wonderful balance between freedom of choice and filling the story.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the lovely review! We’re so happy the music, story, and freedom to play your own way are all coming together for you. Come share your favorite Little Planet moments with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: I love this game it is so innovative so much to do it's like playing The Sims for kids

developer_response.body: Thank you for the lovely review! We’re so glad Little Planet feels creative, innovative, and full of things to do. Come share your favorite builds or family-friendly moments with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: This game is AMAZING! it's like being immersed in Animal Crossing. If you like that game you'll love this one!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We’re so glad you’re feeling that 'immersion' we worked so hard on! 🌟 We’d love to have you join our cozy Discord family: https://discord.gg/littleplanet. See you on the planet! ✨

reviews.review_description:
The game is a lot of fun, there are some bugs, but the dev team is quick to solve any problems you encounter if you report a bug on their discord. 

I like it because it's a more interactive version of Animal crossing but without the need to time travel. 

I can't wait to see what new updates will bring!

developer_response.body: Always a pleasure to see you, Nene!  Thank you for the shoutout to our Discord support. We’ve got even more coming soon! 🚀

reviews.review_title: Great place to meet new friends!
reviews.review_description: My friends and I hang out in Little Planet every single day now. The avatar customization is rich (that Halloween hair is cool!), and decorating your house is so fun—you can really make it unique. The community vibe is amazing and everyone is so friendly. The devs are super active and actually listen to player feedback quickly. If you're looking for a place to "live" in VR, this is it!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Hearing that you and your friends "live" here makes our hearts so full. Stay cozy! 💛

reviews.review_description: So calm, after a stressful day i can play this game to get my mind off of everything.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing this. It means a lot to hear that Little Planet has become a calm place for you after a stressful day. We’re so glad it helps you unwind, and we’d love to have you with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet 💛

reviews.review_description: Animal crossing but less harassment from a certain mole

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re glad Little Planet gives you that cozy life-sim feeling with a softer, more relaxed pace. Come show us your planet on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: i love this game and it help me when i was stress at still do play the game so the you for help me </3

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing this. It means a lot to hear that Little Planet has become a comforting place for you when things feel stressful. We’re so glad you’re still playing, and we’d love to have you with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet 💛

reviews.review_description: It's sooooooo cute and so nice for if you just want to chill

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re so glad Little Planet feels cute and easy to chill in. Come share your cozy planet moments with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description:
Fun, easy interactive game.  You get lost in creating your world.
I love colorful graphics and characters in the different worlds. Great fun that will have you playing for hours.
Definitely a great download...would highly recommend.  Great fun for all ages.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the high recommendation! 🌈 We’re thrilled you're getting lost in your own little world. Join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ❤️

reviews.review_description:
A great game to relax and to play with friends
i love it alot

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re so glad Little Planet feels like a relaxing place to unwind and spend time with friends. Come share your favorite moments with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: This game is so adorable, I love adventure games, and there’s so much to do

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re so glad the adventure, cuteness, and all the little things to do are landing for you. Come share your favorite discoveries with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: Fantastic game where you can use your creativity to design and decorate your planet. There are monthly events with new items, several games you can play with friends, and a lovely helpful community on discord. The developers are caring and responsive.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the wonderful shoutout!  We truly care about every feedback and are so glad you’re enjoying the monthly events. It’s players like you who make our Discord community such a lovely family. See you at the next event!

reviews.review_description: Animal crossing vr kinda co op progression would b nice

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! Co-op progression is a really good suggestion, and we understand how that could make building and exploring with friends feel more rewarding. We’ll share this with the team. If you have specific co-op ideas, come tell us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: Animal crossing in VR~

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re glad Little Planet gives you that cozy VR life-sim feeling. Come share your little world with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: It has a few bugs but still a good game
this game is very kid friendly and you get to explore space and other different games

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re glad Little Planet feels friendly, playful, and full of places to explore. Come share your favorite discoveries with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: i love this game!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re so happy you’re loving Little Planet. Come show us your planet on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description:
Love the game, almost as much as I love animal crossing. I was hoping to be able to explore and customise a whole planet, rather than just an island. Would love to go hunting for fruit that (at the moment) and other things that aren’t available on my patch of land. I don’t really want to have to travel to other peoples planets and make friends so I can get things. I understand it’s a social game but I’m not really a social person, plus I’m an adult and don’t want to be socialising with kids…not sure if there’s a great deal of adults playing.
 I’ve not been playing long, so maybe things will become available as I progress.
I hope more things are added in future updates and more land…as it’s called Little Planet and not Fair sized Island

developer_response.body:
Hi MoonGhost78, thank you so much for the kind words and encouragement.

Expanding the world and giving players more freedom to discover and personalize their space is a big part of our long-term vision. As an indie team, it will take time and steady updates to get there, but please know this is something we’re actively building toward.

We also completely respect players who prefer a more solo experience. We’ve been continuously improving the single-player experience. For example, since our late-January update, the Starnexus minigames can now be played solo. 

If you ever do want to connect with the community on your own terms, most of our players hang out on Discord. You’re very welcome to join us [https://discord.gg/littleplanet] — many adult players are in the community, and you can engage as much or as little as you like.

Thanks again for playing and for supporting us.

reviews.review_description: its a good game. Just add more i lands you can unlock.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We’re glad you’re enjoying Little Planet, and more unlockable islands is a great kind of feedback for us to hear. We’d love to know what types of islands you’d want to explore next, so come share your ideas with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: Im liking it so far, it reminds me of animal crossing so that part is awsome.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re so glad Little Planet is giving you that familiar cozy feeling while still letting you build your own little world. Come share what you’re making on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: Surprisingly cozy and calming with a familiar animal crossing-esque feel

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re happy Little Planet surprised you with that cozy, calming feeling. Come hang out with our community on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet 🍃

reviews.review_description: When i first saw this game i didnt think much of it however, when I downloaded it I LOVED IT! Its kind of like animal crossing yet on VR! I really recommend this game for literally everyone.

developer_response.body: Thank you for giving us a try! 🏠 We love surprises like this—so glad you found your new favorite cozy spot. We’d love to see your planet on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: Really fun to play, a bit like animal crossing but in its own way.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re happy Little Planet feels familiar in the best way while still having its own charm. Come show us your planet on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_title: Great fun and a good way to relax
reviews.review_description: A great way to relax while also keeping you coming back for more. Great events and new items all the time!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re so happy Little Planet has become a relaxing place you want to keep coming back to. More events and items are on the way, and we’d love to see what you collect or build on Discord: https://discord.gg/littleplanet ✨

reviews.review_description: This is so and very calm and cute I can play this for ages without quitting the game!!!!!!

reviews.review_description: I really like this game. I love gathering resources, expanding my home, decorating, crafting, and exploring. It’s nice and cute o go fishing. I have noticed recently that there is glitching. When I was talking to one of the characters  everything stopped working and I couldn’t move. I had to stop playing the game as it kept freezing. When I went to the online feature a few days ago, no one was there, so that was interesting. This game is really nice and I hope that some of the bugs can be fixed and that more will be added to it. It would be nice if you could choose different music to hear during gameplay.￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed feedback!  We're so glad you enjoy the fishing and decorating. We're sorry about the freezing issue—our tech team is investigating this right now!
To help us squash this bug, do you remember which character you were talking to? Also, what were you doing right before the conversation started?
Please reach out to us at support@littleplanet.world or join our Discord (https://discord.gg/littleplanet) so we can help you personally.

reviews.review_title: IMPORTANT UPDATE: Not a bad experience.
reviews.review_description:
After making the decision to return and give it another chance i have actually managed to get the game up and running properly. I'm currently talking to a nice animal within what seems to be a tutorial. The game already looks quite promising i will return soon to finish this review, but for now ill be rating 3 stars until i get reasonably far enough to be sure of my opinions. For now to close this off i must say a graphics update is an absolute must. The aesthetic is cute but i believe you can push the limits a bit farther with the Quest 3 compared to the previous Quest 2. i will be back soon to update this rest assured.

EDIT: i believe there should be an option to properly set rotation speeds because i find the max to still be too slow to play comfortably.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for giving us another chance and for the detailed update! 🌟 We’re thrilled you’re enjoying the tutorial and the aesthetic so far.
Regarding your feedback on rotation speed: You can actually adjust this! If you go to Settings > Rotation and select the 'Smooth' mode, you’ll find an option to increase the rotation speed to your liking. We hope this makes your experience much more comfortable!
We also hear you loud and clear on the Quest 3 graphics. As a small team, we’re constantly looking for ways to push the hardware further while maintaining our cozy style—your feedback helps us prioritize where to polish next.
We’re looking forward to your next update once you’ve explored more! Please join our Discord (https://discord.gg/littleplanet) if you’d like to chat with our devs directly. See you on the planet!

developer_response.body:
We're so honored to have you!  Regarding the backpack upgrade: Our system usually takes about 24 hours to process reviews and deliver the gift to your inventory.
If it hasn't arrived by tomorrow, please reach out to us on Discord (https://discord.gg/littleplanet) or support@littleplanet.world so we can check it for you. Thanks for your patience!

reviews.review_description:
​I’m absolutely in love with the art style and modeling in this game—everything is so dainty and beautifully crafted. It’s honestly my new mental sanctuary.
​The character customization is the best part! There are so many diverse options to choose from, allowing you to dress up your little avatar exactly how you want. No matter how you tweak it, the result is always adorable. Plus, the planet modeling is so aesthetically pleasing; the soft colors and smooth designs are just so soothing to look at. If you need a game to de-stress and just enjoy a beautiful, miniature world, this is a must-buy!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this beautiful review 💛  
We’re really happy Little Planet has become your cozy, relaxing sanctuary.
If you’d like to connect with other cozy explorers, share creations, or get updates, feel free to join our Discord: 👉 https://discord.gg/littleplanet — we’d love to have you ✨
